actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 in scene points to script guid 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d (Fire.cs), matching the provided code. To cover the Fire turning-off path, the object must be isOn=true and must receive repeated IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3) calls at intervals < maxHitInterval (2s) until currentHitTime >= totalHitTime (5s). To cover the turning-on-by-neighbors path, neighbors must be populated and onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold. Until then, this Trigger reserves time to simulate such interactions via physics/collision systems.
